subject: session date
fact: The session date is January 19th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jan 19th, 2026

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a yugoloth who entered a binding contract with the party to retrieve the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass to retrieve the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass provided the party with an hourglass representing the time remaining to secure the book.
source_quote: Maram has provided an hourglass representing the exact time remaining to secure the book

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass suggested inciting a conflict between Vraxen's administration and the demon-powered giants to create a distraction.
source_quote: Maram suggests creating a massive distraction by inciting a conflict between Vraxen's demonic administration and the demon-powered giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass does not know the location of the Path of Shadows but knows Solom Ned'razak does.
source_quote: Maram il Vass doesn't know where that is, but knows Solom Ned'razak does

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur learned he stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch instead of a simple trinket.
source_quote: Felkur has finally learned the truth of his past—he did not steal a simple trinket, but the Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Felkur
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch allowed Felkur to accidentally evade the most powerful mages in Mulmaster for many years.
source_quote: a symbol of power that allowed him to accidentally evade the most powerful mages in Mulmaster for many years

subject: Felkur
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks believes Felkur is a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask.
source_quote: must be a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch for forty pieces of silver.
source_quote: to protect a 'bauble' you sold for forty pieces of silver

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the ruler of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: Solom Ned'razak, the ruler of Szith Morcane

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak requires the blood of a living fire giant infused with fiendish essence to purge demonic taint from the region.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak refuses to join the party directly, viewing himself as indispensable to the drow's survival.
source_quote: Solom refuses to join the party directly, viewing himself as indispensable to the drow's survival

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak considers the adventurers important but replaceable.
source_quote: considering the adventurers 'important but replaceable'

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak provided the party with a slightly outdated map of Maerimydra.
source_quote: Solom provides the characters a map of Maerimydra- -albeit slightly outdated

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower to bypass the Lolth-worshipping matron mothers.
source_quote: The archmage built a secret tunnel out of the Shattered Tower to come and go beyond the sight of the Lolth-worshipping matron mothers

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a drow alchemist and long-time collaborator of Solom's.
source_quote: A drow alchemist that was saved from Maram il Vass, and a long time collaborator of Solom's

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the only survivor of Maerimydra who knows of the secret entrance.
source_quote: Xaven is the only survivor of Maerimydra that knows of the secret entrance

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this knows the knowledge required to create an antidote to the demonic infused Fire Giant blood.
source_quote: Xaven knowledge is key to create an antidote to the demonic infused Fire Giant blood

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a yugoloth in Maerimydra managing Graz'zt's deal with the Fire Giants.
source_quote: Yugoloth in Maerimydra who is managing Graz'zt's deal with the Fire Giants

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen currently possesses the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: The book is in Maerimydra, currently under the possession of Vraxen

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a powerful fiendish giantess who commands the heavy guards at Maerimydra.
source_quote: heavy guards commanded by the giantess Hledh

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals to find Felkur.
source_quote: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks executed three High Inquisitors for failing to find Felkur.
source_quote: They've executed three High Inquisitors for 'failing' to find a master infiltrator

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Fire giants built the Black Ember Outpost over the hidden tunnel entrance without realizing its significance.
source_quote: the fire giants built an outpost at the exit without realizing the significance of their construction

subject: Fire Giants
fact: Some fire giants are imbued with demon blood.
source_quote: not all giants are imbued with demon blood

subject: Myconids
fact: A large colony of myconids resides in the fungal forest at Sporedome.
source_quote: resident to a large colony of myconids

subject: Myconids
fact: The myconids at Sporedome keep their distance from intruders and have not engaged in talks with the drow.
source_quote: the shy creatures keep their distance from intruders

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a drow encampment located in a vast cavern with a fungal forest.
source_quote: The tunnel opens up into a vast cavern... A great fungal forest spreads out on the ground

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: Black Ember Outpost, a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel four miles from the city

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The entrance to the secret tunnel is located in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: The tunnel is found in the southern-most portion of a large pool beneath the outpost

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows is a secret tunnel leading from the Black Ember Outpost directly into the Shattered Tower.
source_quote: The tunnel, known as the Pathway of the Shadows, leads directly into the Shattered Tower

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower is Solom Ned'razak's former center of study inside Maerimydra.
source_quote: Solom's former center of study inside Maerimydra

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex.
source_quote: a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning was a place of law under the Drow regime.
source_quote: The tower was a place of law under the Drow regime

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a tome of great significance required by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: retrieve the Lexicon of Oaths, a tome of great significance

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades in Mulmaster.
source_quote: The brooch is attuned to the defensive wards of the Tower of the Blades

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders.
source_quote: It allows the wearer to bypass certain lethal magical defenses designed to vaporize intruders

subject: Timepiece of Maram il Vass
fact: The Timepiece of Maram il Vass is an hourglass representing the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: An hourglass that represents the total time available to secure the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Portable Hole
fact: The party proposed using a portable hole to transport a shrunken fire giant.
source_quote: stuff in a portable hole

subject: contract signing
fact: The party entered into a binding contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: revelation to Felkur
fact: Maram il Vass revealed the true nature of the item Felkur stole.
source_quote: Maram il Vass discovers that Felkur doesn't even know what he stole and why he is being pursued

subject: reunion at Sporedome
fact: The party reunited with Solom Ned'razak at the drow encampment at Sporedome.
source_quote: Upon returning to the drow encampment at Sporedome, you reunited with Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom's refusal to join
fact: Solom Ned'razak refused the party's offer to join them, stating he is indispensable.
source_quote: The party attempts to recruit Solom. He rejects their offer, explaining that he's indispensable to survival

subject: mushroom hunting
fact: The party spent downtime hunting for mind-protecting mushrooms in Sporedome.
source_quote: With some downtime, the party goes after the mind protecting mushrooms that they found last time in Sporedome

subject: plan to shrink giant
fact: The party proposed a plan to shrink a fire giant, place it in a portable hole, and add a breathing apparatus.
source_quote: They propose a plan to shrink the giant, stuff in a portable hole and add a breathing apparatus to the portable hole

subject: calibration of teleportation circle
fact: Felkur intends to recalibrate the teleportation circle at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning for the party's escape.
source_quote: Felkur intends to recalibrate for your escape

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: Demon-powered giants occupy the city of Maerimydra.
source_quote: the demon-powered giants occupying the city

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: Solom Ned'razak refers to the demon-blooded pests as supported by Graz'zt.
source_quote: demon-blooded pests supported by Graz'zt

subject: retrieving the Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The party must retrieve the Lexicon of Oaths from Vraxen before the hourglass runs out.
source_quote: before your window of opportunity closes

subject: purging demonic taint
fact: Solom Ned'razak requires a living fire giant with fiendish essence to complete a ritual to purge demonic taint.
source_quote: To purge the demonic taint from the region, Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: escaping Maerimydra
fact: The party needs to reach the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning to use its teleportation circle for extraction.
source_quote: To leave the city, you must reach The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
